notes: Single HTML with canvas-based gameplay. 5 plant types (Sunflower, Peashooter, Wall-nut, Snow Pea, Cherry Bomb), 3 zombie types (basic, cone, bucket). 5x9 grid, 10 waves with scaling difficulty. Features: sun economy (natural + sunflower), HP bars, particle effects, freeze mechanics, leaderboard with localStorage, menu system, game over / win modals, high score name entry.
